8 The Procter & Gamble Company
INFORMATION ABOUT OUR EXECUTIVE OFFICERS
The names, ages and positions held by the Executive Officers of the Company on [DATE_TIME], are:
All the Executive Officers named above have been employed by the Company for more than [DATE_TIME].
aMr. [PERSON] previously served as Group President - Global Beauty, Grooming & Health Care ([DATE_TIME]).
bMr. [PERSON] previously served as Vice Chairman and Chief Financial Officer ([DATE_TIME]) and as Chief Financial Officer ([DATE_TIME]).
cMr. [PERSON] previously served as Group President - Global Oral Care ([DATE_TIME]).
dMr. [PERSON] previously served as President - Europe Selling & Market Operations ([DATE_TIME]).
eMs. Ferguson-McHugh previously served as Group President - Global Family Care ([DATE_TIME]).
fMs. [LOCATION] previously served as President - Global Feminine Care ([DATE_TIME]) and as Vice President - Brand Franchise Leader, Feminine Care ([DATE_TIME]).
gMr. [PERSON] previously served as President - Global Fabric Care and Brand-Building Officer Global Fabric & Home Care ([DATE_TIME]) and as President - Fabric Care, [LOCATION]; Brand-Building Officer Fabric & Home Care New Business Creation ([DATE_TIME]).
hMs. [PERSON] previously served as President - Global Skin & Personal Care ([DATE_TIME]).
iMs. [PERSON] previously served as Group President - North America Selling & Market Operations ([DATE_TIME]).
jMs. [PERSON] previously served as Vice President - Human Resources, [LOCATION] and Market Operations ([DATE_TIME]).
The Procter & Gamble Company 9
PART II
Item 5.
